accepted.bullet_text: [[alolan-regional-forms]] — the cohort's **third distinct in-corpus Alolan-form species** and the bearer of the **cultural-religious folk-veneration** adaptation mechanism. The card's flavor — *"These Pokémon are cherished in the Alola region, where they are thought to be feminine deities of the land incarnate."* — canonicalizes a designer-attested adaptation framing distinct from the Alolan Grimer institutional-introduction mechanism and the Alolan Graveler dietary-divergence mechanism, extending the cohort's documented heterogeneity to a sixth species-clustered axis. The long-golden-hair visual divergence from Kantonian Dugtrio's brown-fur design is the line's signature variant feature `[cohort node body; Scryfall flavor_text]`.
accepted.archetype_slot: third distinct in-corpus Alolan-form species / cultural-religious folk-veneration adaptation mechanism
